headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -143.7)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 131% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 158 quotes, including a massive 130 at strong intensity - people are extremely fired up today.
• At 106.8, this sits in the upper third of the 126-day range, showing well above-average anger levels.
• Optimism crashed to near its historical low while fears improved slightly from yesterday's deeper negative territory.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
